debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
M M' : Set β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
hM' : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M'
⊢ MaxDegreeLE (@Graph.IsMatching.restrict₂ α β G M M' hM hM') 2

proof:
haveI : (hM.restrict₂ hM').Loopless := ⟨fun e v h ↦ h.1 v h.2⟩
  rw [maxDegreeLE_iff']
  intro v _
  rw [eDegree_eq_encard_inc]
  have h_sub : E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v) ⊆ (M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v)) := by
    rintro e ⟨w, h_not_loop, h_mem, h_inc⟩
    have h_inc' : e ∈ E(G, v) := ⟨w, h_inc⟩
    rcases h_mem with h | h
    · exact Or.inl ⟨h.1, h_inc'⟩
    · exact Or.inr ⟨h.1, h_inc'⟩
  exact (encard_le_encard h_sub).trans ((encard_union_le _ _).trans (add_le_add (hM.degree_le_one v) (hM'.degree_le_one v)))
successful_attempts:
haveI : (hM.restrict₂ hM').Loopless := ⟨fun e v h ↦ h.1 v h.2⟩
  rw [maxDegreeLE_iff']
  intro v _
  rw [eDegree_eq_encard_inc]
  have h_sub : E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v) ⊆ (M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v)) := by
    rintro e ⟨w, h_not_loop, h_mem, h_inc⟩
    have h_inc' : e ∈ E(G, v) := ⟨w, h_inc⟩
    rcases h_mem with h | h
    · exact Or.inl ⟨h.1, h_inc'⟩
    · exact Or.inr ⟨h.1, h_inc'⟩
  exact (encard_le_encard h_sub).trans ((encard_union_le _ _).trans (add_le_add (hM.degree_le_one v) (hM'.degree_le_one v)))
